content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Section 1.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一段电话对话，一位女士正在咨询
content.en_text: You will hear a telephone conversation between a woman who is looking for information about

content.cn_text: 假期信息，对方是一家旅游公司的代理。
content.en_text: holidays and an agent for a tour company.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第2页的第1至7题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1-7 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例子。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 这个例子已经完成。
content.en_text: done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: Agent：Asia-Pacific Tours，请问有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Agent: Asia-Pacific Tours, can I help you?

content.cn_text: Customer：是的，我一直在看你们的网站，想了解更多关于你们活动
content.en_text: Customer: Yes, I've been looking at your website and I'd like some more information about your activity

content.cn_text: 假期的信息。
content.en_text: holidays.

content.cn_text: Agent：当然可以。
content.en_text: Agent: Certainly.

content.cn_text: Agent：您当然知道，旅游价格包括三星级酒店住宿，也包括
content.en_text: Agent: You know of course the prices of the tours include stays in three star hotels and they include

content.cn_text: 机票。
content.en_text: airfares.

content.cn_text: Customer：太好了。
content.en_text: Customer: Great.

content.cn_text: Customer：你们的越南游怎么样？
content.en_text: Customer: What about your tour of Vietnam?

content.cn_text: Customer：我姐姐去年去了那里，非常喜欢。
content.en_text: Customer: My sister went there last year and loved it.

content.cn_text: 你的英语？
content.en_text: Your English?

content.cn_text: 来电者询问的第一个旅游目的地是越南。
content.en_text: The first tour the caller asks about is Vietnam.

content.cn_text: 所以 Vietnam 已经填在空格里了。
content.en_text: So Vietnam has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在我们开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你应该边听边答题，因为你不会再听到录音
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording

content.cn_text: 第二遍。
content.en_text: a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至7题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1-7.

content.cn_text: Agent：Asia-Pacific Tours，请问有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Agent: Asia-Pacific Tours, can I help you?

content.cn_text: Customer：是的，我一直在看你们的网站，想了解更多关于你们
content.en_text: Customer: Yes, I've been looking at your website and I'd like some more information about your

content.cn_text: 活动假期的信息。
content.en_text: activity holidays.

content.cn_text: Agent：当然可以。
content.en_text: Agent: Certainly.

content.cn_text: Agent：您当然知道，旅游价格包括三星级酒店住宿，也包括
content.en_text: Agent: You know of course the prices of the tours include stays in three star hotels and they include

content.cn_text: 机票。
content.en_text: airfares.

content.cn_text: Customer：太好了。
content.en_text: Customer: Great.

content.cn_text: Customer：你们的越南游怎么样？
content.en_text: Customer: What about your tour of Vietnam?

content.cn_text: Customer：我姐姐去年去了那里，非常喜欢。
content.en_text: Customer: My sister went there last year and loved it.

content.cn_text: Agent：是的，那是个非常美丽的地方，而且可能是我们增长最快的目的地。
content.en_text: Agent: Yes, it's a really beautiful place and probably our fastest growing destination.

content.cn_text: Agent：这个套餐包括几种上课程的机会。
content.en_text: Agent: Now that package includes several opportunities to take courses.

content.cn_text: Customer：你们是不是有某种烹饪课程？
content.en_text: Customer: Don't you have a cookery course of some kind?

content.cn_text: Agent：当然有。
content.en_text: Agent: We certainly do.

content.cn_text: Agent：如果您像大多数人一样喜欢在越南外出用餐，并想知道如何准备一顿饭，
content.en_text: Agent: If you love eating out in Vietnam like most people do and want to know how to prepare a meal,

content.cn_text: 您可以向五星级酒店的大师学习。
content.en_text: you can learn how from a master in a five star hotel.

content.cn_text: Agent：另一天，您可以从两个活动中选择一个。
content.en_text: Agent: On another day you have a choice of two activities.

content.cn_text: Agent：第一个是在南中国海进行潜水指导。
content.en_text: Agent: The first is instruction in diving in the South China Sea.

content.cn_text: Agent：这不是证书课程，只是入门体验。
content.en_text: Agent: Not a certificate course but just an introduction.

content.cn_text: Agent：大多数人都觉得很棒。
content.en_text: Agent: Most people think it's wonderful.

content.cn_text: Agent：或者，如果您想保持干爽但仍想运动，可以花一天时间徒步，
content.en_text: Agent: Or if you want to stay dry but still want some exercise, you can spend the day on a trek

content.cn_text: 穿越海滩附近的丛林。
content.en_text: through the jungle near the beach.

content.cn_text: Agent：这并不难，而且大家似乎都很喜欢。
content.en_text: Agent: It's not difficult and everyone seems to enjoy it.

content.cn_text: Customer：有什么文化类活动吗？
content.en_text: Customer: Anything cultural on offer?

content.cn_text: Agent：我们过去会带游客去看越南歌剧，但事实证明不太受欢迎。
content.en_text: Agent: We used to take people to a Vietnamese opera but that didn't prove so popular.

content.cn_text: Agent：所以现在我们安排了一场舞蹈表演，客户们都赞不绝口。
content.en_text: Agent: So now we include a dance show and our clients all rave about that.

content.cn_text: Agent：他们说色彩非常华丽。
content.en_text: Agent: They say the colours are just magnificent.

content.cn_text: Customer：嗯，费用是多少？
content.en_text: Customer: Hmm, what's the cost?

content.cn_text: Agent：我刚注意到现在是特价。
content.en_text: Agent: I've just noticed it's now a special price.

content.cn_text: Agent：这个假期原价是1600英镑，但刚降到1450英镑，所以您确实省了不少钱，
content.en_text: Agent: The holiday used to be £1,600 but it's just been reduced to £1,450 so you do save quite

content.cn_text: 而且正如我说的，它似乎是我们正在走红的旅游线路。
content.en_text: a bit and as I said it seems to be our up and coming tour.

content.cn_text: Customer：嗯，让我想想，也许你可以给我介绍一下香港游。
content.en_text: Customer: Well, let's see, perhaps you could tell me a little about the Hong Kong tour.

content.cn_text: Customer：我注意到它包括在一个郊野公园的山里散步，在那里有机会
content.en_text: Customer: I noticed it includes a walk in the hills of one of their country parks where you have

content.cn_text: 看到各种鸟类。
content.en_text: the chance to see birds of all sorts.

content.cn_text: Agent：是的，这是非常受欢迎的活动。
content.en_text: Agent: Yes, that's a very popular activity.

content.cn_text: Agent：人们没有意识到香港不只是一个拥挤的城市。
content.en_text: Agent: People don't realise that Hong Kong isn't just a crowded city.

content.cn_text: Agent：这是半日活动，您会由受过训练的陪同人员带领，而且包括在
content.en_text: Agent: That's a half day activity and you go with a trained escort and it includes dinner in

content.cn_text: 一座修道院享用晚餐，一天也在那里结束。
content.en_text: a monastery where you end your day.

content.cn_text: Agent：然后我们也不想让您完全错过购物，所以还有另一天，
content.en_text: Agent: And then we wouldn't want you to miss out all together on shopping so there's another

content.cn_text: Agent：我们会带您参观一家电子产品工厂。
content.en_text: day when we take you around an electronics factory.

content.cn_text: Agent：这听起来可能有点奇怪，但其实非常有意思，
content.en_text: Agent: Now that might sound like an odd thing to do but it's actually really fascinating and

content.cn_text: Agent：并不像通常的陶瓷工厂，而且您可以在那里以很便宜的价格购买他们的产品。
content.en_text: not like your usual ceramics factory and you can buy their products there quite cheaply.

content.cn_text: Agent：整个香港套餐每人只需1320英镑。
content.en_text: Agent: Now the whole Hong Kong package is just £1,320 per person.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来很有意思。
content.en_text: Customer: Sounds interesting.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间查看第8
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation you have some time to look at questions 8

content.cn_text: 至10题，在第2页。
content.en_text: to 10 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 请继续听。
content.en_text: You all listen?

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第8至10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 8 to 10.

content.cn_text: Customer：不过让我再了解一个地方。
content.en_text: Customer: But let me find out about one more place.

content.cn_text: Customer：我一直想去韩国，但不是这次旅行。
content.en_text: Customer: I've always wanted to go to Korea but not on this trip.

content.cn_text: Customer：我去过泰国，非常喜欢那里，不过你们的日本套餐怎么样？
content.en_text: Customer: And I've been to Thailand which I loved but what about your Japan package?

content.cn_text: Agent：不错的选择。
content.en_text: Agent: Good choice.

content.cn_text: Agent：这个旅游包括一次很棒的传统服饰博物馆之旅。
content.en_text: Agent: Well that tour includes a terrific trip to a museum of traditional costume.

content.cn_text: Agent：展品非常漂亮。
content.en_text: Agent: The exhibits are gorgeous.

content.cn_text: Agent：他们有一批极其珍贵的收藏。
content.en_text: Agent: They've got an absolutely priceless collection.

content.cn_text: Customer：我记得网站上说你们会带客户去市场，对吗？
content.en_text: Customer: And I think the website says you take your clients to a market don't you?

content.cn_text: Customer：我想是手工艺品市场。
content.en_text: Customer: A crafts market I think.

content.cn_text: Agent：我们确实会去一个市场，但那是卖鱼的市场，而且是世界上最大的鱼市之一。
content.en_text: Agent: Well we do go to a market but it's one that sells fish and it's one of the largest in the world.

content.cn_text: Agent：您还有机会在附近的小餐馆品尝这些商品。
content.en_text: Agent: And you have the chance to sample the wares in a little restaurant nearby.

content.cn_text: Agent：如果您愿意，我们还会给您大量自由时间，在导游陪同下逛逛城市。
content.en_text: Agent: We also give you plenty of free time to wander around the city with our guides if you want.

content.cn_text: Customer：这些费用是多少？
content.en_text: Customer: And what's the cost of all that?

content.cn_text: Agent：1800英镑。
Customer：你真的帮了很大忙。
content.en_text: Customer: Well you've been ever so helpful.

content.cn_text: Customer：我已经把所有细节都记下来了，等我决定后会再联系你。
content.en_text: Customer: I've noted all the details down and I'll get back to you when I've made up my mind.

content.cn_text: Agent：如果我们还能提供任何帮助，请再打回来。
content.en_text: Agent: If we can give you any more help, do ring back.

content.cn_text: Customer：谢谢，我会的。
content.en_text: Customer: Thanks, I will.
Joel Inglitz Joel Inglitz

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section one.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.
Joel Inglitz Joel Inglitz

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

groups.desc:
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: • either 1. ______ lessons or a one-day trek in the 2. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问越南游可选择什么 lessons，原文说 instruction in diving，因此答案是 diving。

items.title: • either 1. ______ lessons or a one-day trek in the 2. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问一日徒步是在什么地方，原文说 trek through the jungle，因此答案是 jungle。

items.title: • attend a 3. ______ performance
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问可参加什么 performance，原文说 dance show，因此答案是 dance。
答案解析：第4题问越南游费用，原文说 reduced to £1,450，因此答案是 1450。

items.title: • go to the hills to look at 5. ______ in a country park
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问香港游去山里看什么，原文说 see birds of all sorts，因此答案是 birds。

items.title: • followed by 6. ______ in a monastery
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问香港游在修道院之后/包括什么，原文说 includes dinner in a monastery，因此答案是 dinner。

items.title: • visit an 7. ______ factory with the chance to shop
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问香港游参观什么 factory，原文说 electronics factory，因此答案是 electronics。
答案解析：第8题问第三个旅游目的地，原文说 what about your Japan package，因此答案是 Japan。

items.title: • visit a museum of traditional 9. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问日本游参观传统什么的博物馆，原文说 museum of traditional costume，因此答案是 costume。

items.title: • tour of a big 10. ______ market
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问日本游参观大型什么市场，原文说 market... sells fish，因此答案是 fish。

Asia-Pacific Tours Activity Holidays
Q4: $4$

content:
• a cookery course at a 5-star hotel
• either $1$ lessons or a one-day trek in the $2$
• attend a $3$ performance

• go to the hills to look at $5$ in a country park
• followed by $6$ in a monastery
• visit an $7$ factory with the chance to shop

• visit a museum of traditional $9$
• tour of a big $10$ market
